title: Mayor Owens Announces Road Reconstruction Project on S Salina St
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced a road reconstruction project on South Salina Street between Ballantyne Road and West Seneca Turnpike, beginning June 8, 2026. The milling and paving work will reduce traffic to one lane during daytime hours (6 a.m.–6 p.m.) in phases, with completion expected within one week pending weather conditions.

entity_refs.name: City of Syracuse Office of Communications

political_signal.description: Mayor publicly announces infrastructure investment in road maintenance, signaling commitment to city infrastructure and public safety.
